items.claim: Light heavyweight fighters possess enough power that every strike has the potential to end a fight.
items.quote: Like they hit so hard, dude. They hit so hard. It's a sketchy sort of uh sketchy fight dynamic when every touch can kind of put you away.

items.claim: Max Holloway has maintained a high level of activity and grit by fighting top-tier opponents like Justin Gaethje and Dustin Poirier during Conor McGregor's absence.
items.quote: he fought Justin Gatei, he fought with Deaporia in a time that Conor Gun is seeing.
